auth.loginSubtitle: Log in to manage your broker profile and view on-chain reviews.

brokerList.title: Broker directory
brokerList.subtitle: Browse broker profiles available for claiming.

brokerManage.claimSubtitle: Submit your CE reference number and an authorization letter to claim ownership of this broker profile.
brokerManage.companyLetterHint: Upload your company authorization letter to IPFS, then paste the CID here.
brokerManage.claimSuccessMessage: Your claim request is queued for admin review. Once approved, you will gain ownership of this broker profile.
brokerManage.alreadyClaimed: This broker profile has already been claimed.
brokerManage.disclaimer: All reviews are immutable once anchored on chain.

dashboard.title: OpenTrade merchant back office
dashboard.subtitle: Claim profiles, track on-chain reviews, and publish strategy signals. The full feature set ships in Phase 1.
dashboard.shellDescription: Built for brokers, KOLs, and platform admins; desktop-first. All workflows are previews until Phase 1 launches.

claim.title: Profile claim
claim.description: Bind a licensed broker or a KOL identity after KYC and take ownership of your on-chain profile.

reviews.title: On-chain reviews
reviews.description: Read user reviews ordered chain-time-first and weighted by SBT tier. The platform has no power to delete on-chain content.

signals.title: Strategy signals
signals.description: KOLs publish buy / sell / hold calls on-chain; an oracle scores them objectively, building a verifiable personal brand.

disputes.title: Dispute resolution
disputes.description: Submit two-sided evidence into a decentralised jury process; the verdict is recorded immutably on-chain.

dashboard.phaseHint: Login, KYC, and RBAC arrive with Phase 1.
dashboard.disclaimer: This platform surfaces on-chain data only and does not constitute investment advice.

broker.readonlyFields: The following is public SFC data and cannot be edited
broker.missingFields: Consider adding the following to improve credibility:
